name: AMERICAN STATES WATER CO
summary: PARTI This annual report on Form10-K is a combined report being filed by two separate Registrants, American States Water Company (AWR) and Golden State Water Company (GSWC). References in this report to Registrant are to AWR and GSWC, collectively, unless otherwise specified. GSWC makes no representations as to the information contained in this report relating to AWR and its subsidiaries, other than GSWC. AWR makes its annual reports on Form10-K, quarterly reports on Form 10-Q and current report...
